name: Monthly Collection sample report
query:
Select
MCT.year as 'Year:data:100',
MCT.month as 'Month:Data:100',
MCTD.customer as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
MCTD.customer_name as "Customer Name:Data:240",
MCTD.amount as "Collection Target Amount:currency:180",
(Select sum(PE.paid_amount) from `tabPayment Entry` PE
where PE.docstatus=1 and PE.party = MCTD.customer and PE.payment_type = "Receive"
and MCT.month = MONTHNAME(PE.posting_date) and  MCT.year = YEAR(PE.posting_date)) as "PAYMENT Collection Amount:currency:180",

(Select sum(JEA.credit_in_account_currency) from `tabJournal Entry` as JE 
inner join `tabJournal Entry Account` as JEA on JE.name = JEA.parent
where JE.docstatus=1 and JEA.party = MCTD.customer and JEA.party_type = "Customer"
and MCT.month = MONTHNAME(JE.posting_date) and  MCT.year = YEAR(JE.posting_date)) as "Actual Collection Amount:currency:180"
from `tabMonthly Collection Target` as MCT
inner join `tabMonthly Collection Target Details` as MCTD on MCT.name = MCTD.parent
where MCT.month = %(month)s and MCT.year = %(year)s and MCT.sales_person=%(sales_person)s and MCT.docstatus = 1
order by MCTD.customer_name
